final_prompt: Use case: stylized-concept; Asset type: main menu background for Orbwalker; Primary request: production candidate main-menu cavern/city background for a fantasy match-3 roguelike. Scene/backdrop: ancient underground cavern opening into a distant magical city gate, stone arches, faint elemental crystals, subtle treasure hints. Subject: environment only, no characters, no UI, no text. Style/medium: polished stylized 2D game background, painterly but clean, readable behind menu buttons. Composition/framing: vertical mobile-friendly scene with a calm central safe area and darker edges for UI contrast. Lighting/mood: inviting fantasy adventure, cool cave shadows with warm city/gold highlights. Color palette: dark stone, teal/cyan crystals, warm gold lanterns, restrained saturation. Constraints: no text, no logo, no watermark, no characters, no UI controls, no casino imagery, no gore.
